title: polystichum munitum
intro: Polystichum munitum, also known as the sword fern, is a species of evergreen fern native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Polystichum munitum include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antioxidant properties which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Polystichum munitum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
